settings.title: Come to Our Spring Open Morning
settings.excerpt: A chance for families considering a place with us to look around while the children are busy at play.
settings.body:
Choosing a daycare is a big decision, and no website can show you what a room actually feels like. The best way to know is to come and see it.

Little Oaks is holding an open morning on Saturday 16 May, from ten until noon. You can walk through our rooms, meet some of the team, and ask every question on your list, however small.

What you can see on the day

The morning is deliberately relaxed, with the children at play so you get an honest picture rather than a tidied-up one. You are welcome to:

  • Walk through every room and the garden at your own pace.
  • Meet the staff who would be looking after your child.
  • Ask about the things that matter to you, from settling in to mealtimes.

We will have the garden open and tea for the grown-ups. Little ones are very welcome too, so bring them along and let them try the place out for themselves.

If you cannot make it

If Saturday does not work for you, please do not worry. Give us a call and we will arrange a quieter visit on a weekday, when you can see an ordinary morning in full swing. There is no wrong time to come and look.
